content_body: Our wonderful boss invited us (4 amazing therapists) to the mountains to participate in yearly planning. We enjoyed the fire, great food, and great conversations as we shared ideas. Your home is beautiful and we so appreciate the time that we spent here! Best wishes for a happy and healthy 2017!  -Melanie, Claire, Jessica, Jessie, and Jill (Kids Creek Therapy)
title: Appreciative Of The Time We Spent Here
